sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, You Who give us the joy of celebrating the anniversary of the death of blessed Saturninus, Your Martyr, grant that we may be helped by his merits.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: O Lord, make holy the sacrificial gifts we offer to You, and through the intercession of blessed Saturninus, Your Martyr, be appeased and look with favor upon us.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: May the reception of Your sacrament, we beseech You, O Lord, make us holy, and by the intercession of Your saints, make us pleasing to You.
